title: Untitled document
text_content:
REBOOT (Founding Cohort)
90 days. Young men 18–25. Ambitious but drifting.
Promise (simple): By Day 90 you will have:
A chosen direction (12-month target)
A daily routine you actually follow
2 destructive habits removed
Visible momentum (fitness + money/skill OR social)
Delivery (simple):
Weekly group call
Accountability chat
Weekly assignment
1 onboarding 1:1 (or structured intake)
1 roadmap 1:1 at the end
That’s enough to charge $750 and get results.
One-sentence Pitch:I help ambitious young men who feel lost build structure and direction in 90 days.





The DM you send tomorrow (copy/paste)
Warm leads: “Yo — quick honest question: do you feel clear and structured about your direction right now? I’m opening a small founding group for ambitious guys 18–25 who feel lost but know they’re capable of more. Want me to send you the details?”
If they say yes: “Cool. It’s called Initiate Arena. 90 days. Weekly group call + accountability + a diagnostic report that shows exactly where you’re drifting + what to do next. It’s $750 for founding members. Want to hop on a quick call and see if it’s a fit?”















Your sales call (simple, no “sales” energy)
You’re running a diagnosis.
Questions (don’t wing it):
“What’s your current situation day-to-day?”
“What are you most frustrated about?”Development
“What are you avoiding?”
“If nothing changes in 12 months, what happens?”
“If it did change, what would life look like?”
Then: “Based on what you said, you’re ambitious but drifting because you don’t have structure. That’s exactly what Initiate Arena is for.”
Stop talking. Present the price. Silence.






















So tomorrow:9–11am → 30 DMs
11–12pm → Follow-ups
1–3pm → Calls or booking
Evening → Content creation + gymNot about the app.No empire building.Only Initiate Arena.
And I want you to track:
Sent
Responses
Calls booked
Closed
INITIATE ARENA – FOUNDING COHORT (V1)
ONE-SENTENCE POSITIONING
I help ambitious young men (18–25) who feel lost build structure and direction in 90 days.

WHO THIS IS FOR
Feels behind in life
Knows they’re capable of more
Lacks daily structure
Scrolls too much / escapes too much
Doesn’t have a clear 12-month direction
Is willing to do uncomfortable work
Not for:
Victim mindset
Blames others
Wants motivation without execution

CORE PROMISE (90 DAYS)
By Day 90, you will have:
A defined 12-month direction
A daily structure you actually follow
2 destructive habits eliminated or controlled
Measurable momentum in one key area (skill, fitness, income, or social)

DELIVERY STRUCTURE
Weekly 90-min group call
Private accountability group (Discord/Telegram)
Weekly execution assignment
Initiate Diagnostic Report (Week 1–2)
90-Day Personal Execution Plan
End-of-program Roadmap Call
Price (Founding Members): $750

OUTREACH SCRIPT (COPY/PASTE)
Warm:
“Hey — honest question. Do you feel clear and structured about your direction right now? I’m opening a small founding group for ambitious guys 18–25 who feel lost but know they’re capable of more. Want details?”
Cold:
“Random but real question — do you feel clear about where your life is going right now? I’m building something for ambitious young men who feel stuck but capable of more.”

SALES CALL STRUCTURE (DO NOT DEVIATE)
Phase 1 – Situation
What does a normal week look like?
What frustrates you most right now?
What are you avoiding?
Phase 2 – Future
If nothing changes in 12 months, what happens?
If everything changes, what’s different?
Phase 3 – Gap
What’s actually stopping you?
Where do you self-sabotage?
Then say:
“Based on what you’re telling me, you’re ambitious but drifting because you lack structure and accountability. That’s exactly what Initiate Arena is designed for.”
Explain program. State price. Silence.

INITIATE ARENA – 90 DAY TRANSFORMATION MAP
Phase 1 (Weeks 1–2): Stabilization
Objective: Stop drift. Install structure.
By end of Week 2:
Fixed wake time (within 30 min) 10/14 days
10 focus blocks completed
1 destructive habit reduced 70%+
Time audit completed
Written 12-month direction draft
Ideal Week schedule built
Transformation: From chaotic → structured.
Identity shift: “I wake up when I say I will.”

Phase 2 (Weeks 3–6): Direction + Skill Activation
Objective: Install a primary execution lane.
Each member must choose ONE:
Income skill
Fitness transformation
Career positioning move
Social confidence development
By end of Week 6:
20+ focused sessions on chosen lane
Measurable output (portfolio piece, client outreach, bodyweight progress, or social exposure reps)
2 eliminated distractions fully removed
Weekly review habit installed
Transformation: From drifting → executing in one lane.
Identity shift: “I build daily.”

Phase 3 (Weeks 7–10): Pressure + Exposure
Objective: Introduce real-world friction.
Depending on lane:
Income lane → 30 outreach messages sent
Fitness lane → visible body change + strength progression
Career lane → applications or interviews completed
Social lane → 10 uncomfortable social reps
By end of Week 10:
Proof of action under discomfort
Public or real-world execution
Reported confidence increase from earned proof (not affirmation)
Transformation: From safe → exposed.
Identity shift: “I move despite fear.”

Phase 4 (Weeks 11–12): Identity Lock-In
Objective: Cement identity.
Deliverables:
Personal Operating Code (1-page identity document)
12-Month Execution Plan
3 Non-Negotiables for next year
Habit systems installed
Final Drift Score vs Day 1 comparison
Transformation: From trying → becoming.
Identity shift: “I am structured.”

Now we have:
Start state: Lost, inconsistent, drifting.
End state: Structured, directional, executing, proof-producing.
That is sellable.
CONTENT STRATEGY – NEXT 30 DAYS
Your job: Attract drifting but ambitious young men.
Not entrepreneurs. Not empire builders. Not wealth engineers.
Drifters with fire inside.

CONTENT PILLARS (Stage 1 Aligned)
Pillar 1: Call Out Drift
Expose patterns:
“You’re not confused. You’re undisciplined.”
“You don’t lack purpose. You lack structure.”
“Scrolling is the new sedation.”
“You don’t need more podcasts. You need constraints.”
Short-form. Direct. Binary.

Pillar 2: Document Your Rebuild
You’re rebuilding publicly.
Show:
Wake time
Focus blocks
Gym
Reading
Outreach numbers
Honest struggles
Not cinematic mythology yet. Proof.

Pillar 3: Micro-Frameworks (Fractal Lite)
Use your fractal thinking — but compress it.
Instead of: “Phase II – System Mastery”
Say: “The 3 Leaks Killing Young Men”
Sleep chaos
Dopamine overload
No execution lane
Instead of: “Wealth Engine Architecture”
Say: “If you’re 22 and broke, your only job is skill acquisition.”
Same intelligence. Different packaging.

Posting Rhythm
Daily:
1 short-form (Reel/TikTok/Short)
1 story showing execution
DM call-to-action
Twice per week:
Slightly longer post explaining a concept
No VSL. No funnel building. No automation yet.
From my knowledge source: Leads are generated through repeated exposure and proactive engagement .
Content feeds outreach. Outreach closes.










WEEKLY OPERATING SYSTEM (Next 30 Days)
Daily: 9–11am → Outreach (30 DMs minimum) 11–12pm → Follow-ups Calls scheduled ASAP Gym Evening → Content batching/editing
Twice per week: Live stream (45–60 minutes max)
No more than that.

LIVE STREAM STRUCTURE (Stage 1 Aligned)
Title format: “How to Stop Drifting in Your 20s” “The 4 Leaks Killing Young Men” “You Don’t Lack Purpose. You Lack Structure.”
Keep it painfully practical.
Structure each live like this:
Segment 1 (10 min) – The Problem Call out drift patterns:
Waking up late
Scrolling
Avoiding discomfort
No execution lane
Segment 2 (15 min) – The Diagnosis Explain:
Why structure beats motivation
Why clarity follows action
Why most young men overthink instead of execute
Segment 3 (15 min) – The Framework Give ONE simple tool:
Time Audit
Ideal Week
7 Focus Blocks Rule
Habit Elimination Protocol
Segment 4 (10 min) – Case + Call to Action Talk about:
Your rebuild
What Initiate Arena does
Who it’s for
End with: “If you’re ambitious but drifting, DM me ‘ARENA’.”
That’s it.

Now here’s how this multiplies:
From 1 live stream you extract:
5–7 short clips
2 quote graphics
1 YouTube long-form upload
3–5 story clips
DM CTA
That feeds outreach credibility.
Not funnel complexity.
From my knowledge source: You don’t need more vehicles — you need more distribution of a clear message .
















Weekly Vlog Positioning
This is not: “Watch my life.”
This is: “Watch the system in action.”
The hero is not you.
The hero is: Structure. Discipline. Execution.
You are the case study.

Weekly Vlog Structure (Locked)
Title examples:
“Applying My Own System for 7 Days (Real Results)”
“Sent 210 DMs This Week – Here’s What Happened”
“Rebuilding From Scratch: Week 1 of Initiate Arena”
Structure:
1. Declare the Constraints (2–3 min)
This week:
Wake time target
Focus blocks target
Outreach target
Gym target
Make it measurable.
2. Show Execution
Clips of:
You sending DMs
Tracking numbers
Waking up
Gym
Planning calls
Not cinematic fluff. Real work.
3. Metrics Breakdown
At the end:
Messages sent
Calls booked
Closes
Habit compliance rate
Where you failed
This builds trust.
4. Reflection
One lesson.
Not 10. One.
5. Clear CTA
“If you’re ambitious but drifting and want structure like this, DM ‘ARENA.’”
Simple.
